perturbation.original_text: The parties agree that neither party will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Transaction by virtue of this Agreement, except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. The parties further acknowledge and agree that they each reserve the right, in their sole and absolute discretion, to reject any and all proposals and to t erminate discussions and negotiations with respect to a Transaction at any time. This Agreement does not create a joint venture or partnership between the parties. If a Transaction goes forward, the non -disclosure provisions of any applicable transaction documents entered into between the parties (or their respective affiliates) for the Transaction shall supersede this Agreement. In the event such provision is not provided for in said transaction documents, this Agreement shall control.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties agree that neither party will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Transaction by virtue of this Agreement, except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. The parties further acknowledge and agree that they each reserve the right, in their sole and absolute discretion, to reject any and all proposals and to t erminate discussions and negotiations with respect to a Transaction at any time. This Agreement does create a preliminary joint venture or partnership between the parties for due diligence purposes only. If a Transaction goes forward, the non -disclosure provisions of any applicable transaction documents entered into between the parties (or their respective affiliates) for the Transaction shall supersede this Agreement. In the event such provision is not provided for in said transaction documents, this Agreement shall control.
perturbation.explanation: In Section 9, the modified text introduces an in-text contradiction. The original text clearly states: 'This Agreement does not create a joint venture or partnership between the parties.' The changed text states: 'This Agreement does create a preliminary joint venture or partnership between the parties for due diligence purposes only.' This creates conflicting statements about whether the agreement establishes a partnership or joint venture, leading to potential disputes about the parties' obligations and liabilities.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The parties agree that neither party will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Transaction by virtue of this Agreement, except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. The parties further acknowledge and agree that they each reserve the right, in their sole and absolute discretion, to reject any and all proposals and to t erminate discussions and negotiations with respect to a Transaction at any time. This Agreement does create a preliminary joint venture or partnership between the parties for due diligence purposes only. If a Transaction goes forward, the non -disclosure provisions of any applicable transaction documents entered into between the parties (or their respective affiliates) for the Transaction shall supersede this Agreement. In the event such provision is not provided for in said transaction documents, this Agreement shall control.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text explicitly states 'This Agreement does not create a joint venture or partnership between the parties,' while the changed text states 'This Agreement does create a preliminary joint venture or partnership between the parties for due diligence purposes only.' The contradicted text is in the same location as the changed text, emphasizing the directness of the conflict. This creates a strong in-text contradiction, leading to uncertainty and potential disputes.

perturbation.original_text: Any notices or communications required or permitted to be given hereunde r may be delivered by hand, deposited with a nationally recognized overnight carrier, electronic -mail, or mailed by certified mail, return receipt requested, postage prepaid, in each case, to the address of the other party first indicated above (or such ot her addressee as may be furnished by a party in accordance with this paragraph). All such notices or communications shall be deemed to have been given and received (a) in the case of personal delivery or electronic -mail, on the date of such delivery, (b) in the case of delivery by a nationally recognized overnight carrier, on the third business day following dispatch and (c) in the case of mailing, on the seventh business day following such mailing.
perturbation.changed_text: Any notices or communications required or permitted to be given hereunde r may be delivered by hand, deposited with a nationally recognized overnight carrier, or mailed by certified mail, return receipt requested, postage prepaid, in each case, to the address of the other party first indicated above (or such ot her addressee as may be furnished by a party in accordance with this paragraph). All such notices or communications shall be deemed to have been given and received (a) in the case of personal delivery , on the date of such delivery, (b) in the case of delivery by a nationally recognized overnight carrier, on the third business day following dispatch and (c) in the case of mailing, on the seventh business day following such mailing.
perturbation.explanation: The modification in Section 11(e) creates an in-text contradiction by removing 'electronic-mail' as a valid method for delivering notices, but leaving the definition of when such notices are deemed to be delivered (a) in the case of personal delivery or electronic -mail, on the date of such delivery'. Now the text states electronic-mail is not permitted but included in the definition of when it is deemed to be delivered.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Any notices or communications required or permitted to be given hereunde r may be delivered by hand, deposited with a nationally recognized overnight carrier, or mailed by certified mail, return receipt requested, postage prepaid, in each case, to the address of the other party first indicated above (or such ot her addressee as may be furnished by a party in accordance with this paragraph). All such notices or communications shall be deemed to have been given and received (a) in the case of personal delivery , on the date of such delivery, (b) in the case of delivery by a nationally recognized overnight carrier, on the third business day following dispatch and (c) in the case of mailing, on the seventh business day following such mailing.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes 'electronic-mail' as a valid method for delivering notices, but the definition of when notices are deemed to be delivered still includes 'electronic-mail' in section (a). This creates a direct in-text contradiction because the contract now states email is not permitted, but also defines when it is considered delivered, causing inconsistency regarding which terms should be enforced.

perturbation.original_text: All obligations contained in this Agreement shall #886871 5 extend to and be binding upon the parties to this Agreement and their respective successors, assigns and designees.
perturbation.changed_text: All obligations contained in this Agreement shall not extend to and be binding upon the parties to this Agreement and their respective successors, assigns and designees.
perturbation.explanation: Changing Section 11(f) to state that obligations will 'not' extend to successors introduces a direct in-text contradiction. This goes against standard legal practice and creates a severe conflict within the contract's terms, since, under normal practice, the obligations should be extended to and binding on the parties to this Agreement and their respective successors, assigns and designees.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement is personal in nature, and neither par ty may directly or indirectly assign or transfer it by operation of law or otherwise without the prior written consent of the other party, which consent will not be unreasonably withheld. All obligations contained in this Agreement shall not extend to and be binding upon the parties to this Agreement and their respective successors, assigns and designees.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that obligations will 'not' extend to successors, which directly contradicts the original intent and standard legal practice, as explained in the 'Perturbation Explanation'. Although the Changed Text and Contradicted Text appear to be in the same location, the explanation provided states that the changes introduced in the section cause contradiction within the contract's terms.
